name: Mermaid (Markdown-Driven Diagramming)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); Knut Sveidqvist; Mermaid Chart is commercial SaaS

auth.notes: Browser/Node rendering; no auth for self-hosted; Mermaid Chart SaaS has auth

performance.notes: Browser rendering via D3; complex diagrams can be slow

agent_readiness.notes: Text-to-diagram library. Diagram types: flowchart, sequence, class, state, entity-relationship, Gantt, pie, gitGraph, mindmap, timeline, C4. Markdown code blocks: ` ```mermaid `. Native in GitHub, GitLab, Notion, Confluence, VS Code. mermaid.render(id, code) returns SVG. mmdc CLI for PNG/SVG export. TypeScript types. mermaid-live-editor. LLMs generate mermaid diagrams well. D2 and PlantUML are alternatives. Most adopted text-based diagramming standard.

gotchas: Complex diagrams with many nodes can get cluttered
Some diagram types have limited styling options
Large diagrams may timeout in browser rendering
best_when: Documentation with diagrams natively rendered in GitHub/GitLab/Notion
Sequence diagrams for API flows, flowcharts for processes
avoid_when: Complex diagrams needing precise layout control (use draw.io/Excalidraw)
summary: Mermaid renders diagrams from text in Markdown code blocks. Flowchart, sequence, class, ER, Gantt, gitGraph, mindmap, C4. Natively supported in GitHub, GitLab, Notion, Confluence. mermaid.render() for JavaScript embedding, mmdc CLI for PNG/SVG export. LLMs generate Mermaid diagrams well — best for AI-assisted documentation. The standard text-based diagramming tool for developer documentation.
